title: galium lucidum var. abruptorum
intro: Galium lucidum var. abruptorum, also known as Chinese Galium, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Galium lucidum var. abruptorum are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Galium lucidum var. abruptorum is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
